info.name: Custom Platform Webhook Integration
info.description:
# 🚀 Custom Channel Webhook API

This collection provides a robust starting point for developers to integrate with the **Custom Channel Webhook**. It automates the generation of the mandatory **HMAC-SHA256 Signature** and handles **Unix Timestamps** for secure message delivery.

### 🛠 Setup Guide

1.  **Configure Variables**: Open the **Variables** tab of this collection.
2.  **Authentication**: Input your `bot_id` and `signingSecret` (found in the Management Console).
3.  **Webhook URL**: The `webhookUrl` variable is pre-configured for your bot.
4.  **Send Request**: Review the `Console` in Postman for raw request/signature details.

### 🔒 Security Headers
Every request automatically attaches:
- `X-Platform-Signature`: `sha256=<hex_hash>`
- `X-Platform-Timestamp`: Current Unix time (seconds)

---

exec: // We replace variables in the string FIRST, then parse to JSON
// Ensure UID and Source ID are identical as requested
// Generate a unique Message ID if not provided
// Ensure timestamp is a number (it might come in as a string from {{$timestamp}})
// Update the raw body with these processed values

request.description: Sends a signed text message payload to the specified Webhook URL. The signature and timestamp headers are generated automatically based on the final processed JSON body.

variable.description: Full target webhook URL. Constructs automatically from bot_id.
The secret used to sign the request (from Channel Permissions → Token). Keep this secure.
The unique identifier for your bot instance.
Visible sender name displayed in the chat.
Content of the text message to be sent.
Unique User ID. Leave empty to auto-generate a GUID. source_id will match this value automatically.
Message ID. Leave empty to auto-generate a unique GUID for every message.
